name: zucked
description: Roger McNamee's insider account of how Facebook's business model created a catastrophe — undermining democracy, exploiting attention, eroding privacy, and harming mental health.
useCase: Understanding the attention economy, Facebook's role in disinformation and democracy, protecting digital privacy, addressing social media's mental health harms, and advocating for regulation.
knownRisks: McNamee is a former Facebook insider — his perspective is shaped by personal experience and may lack objectivity
Some specific claims about Russian interference have been contested by Facebook and others
The book was published in 2019 — some details about regulation and platform changes may be dated
McNamee has financial interests (he still owns Facebook stock at the time of writing)
